name: agentmemory-capture
description: OpenCode plugin for agentmemory - 45 capture paths covering broad lifecycle signals. Typed hooks: tool.execute.before / tool.execute.after, chat.message / chat.params, command.execute.before, experimental.chat.system.transform / experimental.chat.messages.transform / experimental.session.compacting / experimental.compaction.autocontinue (observe-only, leaves output.enabled untouched), config, and dispose (plugin-reload, NOT session end). Bus events: full session lifecycle (created / status idle+busy+retry / compacted / updated / diff / deleted / error), messages (updated / removed / part.updated / part.removed), file edits + file.watcher.updated, permissions (asked / replied / updated / v2.asked / v2.replied), todo.updated, vcs.branch.updated, command.executed, lsp.client.diagnostics, question.asked / replied / rejected (v1 + v2 buses, captures first-question options summary), mcp.tools.changed, mcp.browser.open.failed, installation.update-available, pty.created / pty.exited (skipping chatty pty.updated and pty.deleted). Built-in reliability: server-side trailing-edge idle checkpoint (consolidate after AGENTMEMORY_IDLE_CHECKPOINT_MS of no activity, default 10m, plus a background idle poll; AGENTMEMORY_CHECKPOINT_DEBOUNCE_MS alias), HTTPS bearer warning, DEBUG-only /health probe at init, tool output base64/image sanitization, env-driven timeouts (OPENCODE_AGENTMEMORY_TIMEOUT_MS, OPENCODE_AGENTMEMORY_HEAVY_TIMEOUT_MS), resumed-session re-injection via /session/start. Plugin source is type-narrowed against EventV1 | EventV2 with zero blanket as-any casts. Ships 16 skills (9 invocable: recall, remember, health, recap, handoff, forget, commit-context, commit-history, session-history; 7 reference) to ~/.config/opencode/skills/ - OpenCode merges these into its unified slash command palette via source: skill. One-shot install via `agentmemory connect opencode --with-plugin`.
